title: School Management Executive (Hillcrest Road)
description:
Job Scope:
Administrative duties include:

  • Admissions Officer – Direct School Admission (DSA) for Junior High (JH) & Senior High (SH). Conceptualises the process, registration website, database of students, informing students and parents of test date, preparation for selection interview, compile final list, assist VP/Year
  • Heads in answering and writing replies to parents and students.
  • Assist VP/Year Head with Direct School Admission (DSA) /Joint Admission Exercise (JAE) appeal matters and student enrolments for returning Singaporean/International students.
  • To plan and arrange for Junior High Parent-Teacher Meetings (PTM) (Apr, June, July)
  • To participate in Sec 1 posting exercise (End Nov to Dec)
  • To participate in Junior High1 Orientation: Jan
  • Assist in conducting School tour/Open house: Assist VP/Year Heads with website registration, school list analysis
  • Support Parent-In-Action (PAACT) with logistics for AGM, Parent-In-Action (PAACT) Executive Committee meetings, Principal-parent Meeting, Teachers’ Day celebration, coordinating PAACT membership registration during Junior High1 Orientation and informing parents of school events, updates from MOE etc.
  • Liaising with PAACT on printing, assignment and distribution of donation cards, parent registration etc.
  • To cover reception duty from 4 p.m. to 6 p.m. daily
  • To assist inn verification of students with HR agencies
  • To assist in printing of name cards.
  • Covering duty of reception duty and Student Services Centre (SSC) when required.
  • Ad Hoc admin. duties
  • Assist in PTM & School Tours (on actual day)
  • Assisting in DSA JH & SH admission (Registration on actual day), e-mails & phone enquiries related to admissions)

Working Arrangement:
Location: Hillcrest Road
Working Hours:
• Mondays to Thursdays: 9:00am to 6:00pm, inclusive of 30 minutes lunch break

• Fridays: 9:00am to 5:30pm, inclusive of 30 minutes lunch break

• Service not required on Saturdays, Sundays and gazetted public holidays
Salary: $2760/Month

Requirements:
a. Good communication and interpersonal skills

b. Good team player with a high level of initiative and independence.

c. Proficient in MS Office

d. Candidate with minimum 2 years working experience in schools.

e. Able to work in a fast paced environment

EA License No.: 96C4864 (Shanice Lim Xin Ni)

Reg. No.: R22110485
